officials.name: C. Gwyn
officials.allowances: 100l. duty allowance, 30l. as Chairman of Navigation and Pilotage Board, and 50l. as Currency Officer

officials.name: Clinton Greig
officials.allowances: 80l. duty allowance and 2s.3d. forage allowance per diem

officials.name: H. Hollis
officials.allowances: 100l. duty allowance, forage allowance 2s. 3d. per diem.
